narrative: Strait of Hormuz tensions and crude prices above $94/bbl into the Tokyo open — AUD, CAD likely supported. EUR/USD closed Friday at 1.1726; ECB hold on April 30 removes near-term downside risk but 175bp Fed-ECB differential caps upside. USD/JPY watch: BoJ meeting on April 28; any hawkish surprise would pressure USD/JPY from Friday's 159.33 close.
